name: AchievementGate

neutralConcepts: idempotent by (userId, achievementId) — second qualifying submission does not re-emit

ironRules.rule: T87 reads xiigen-achievement-records BEFORE any emit. If (userId, achievementId) record already exists: return success without emitting AchievementUnlocked.
Idempotent by (userId, achievementId) — a second qualifying submission must not produce a second AchievementUnlocked event.
DNA-8: storeDocument BEFORE AchievementUnlocked enqueue. Order: store-achievement-record → enqueue.

keywords: achievement gate idempotency history check userId achievementId double unlock prevention
